feed.title: Tran Quoc Dang’s Portfolio
feed.subtitle: A portfolio showcasing my education, work experience, projects, and skills

entry.title: Restructuring my Portfolio and Blog
entry.content:
Welcome to my renewed website! I’ve redesigned it to serve as both a professional portfolio and a personal blog.

Stay tuned for more updates on my research in Information and Communication Engineering, personal projects, and other tech insights.
entry.summary: Welcome to my renewed website! I’ve redesigned it to serve as both a professional portfolio and a personal blog.
